summary: Iter 178 Portal Dashboard Phase 2 tested end-to-end. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed (Tasks CRUD, status transitions with completed_at, validation 400s, Tracked Documents CRUD with buckets/days_left, Client Health scoring with 6 factors + grade, Compliance Calendar with statutory+task+doc merge, toggle on/off flip, Alerts payload shape, role scoping for company_admin, and auth guards). Frontend (web preview @ 1280x900): portal-dashboard-screen renders, all 5 tab testIDs present (pd-tab-overview/tasks/clients/documents/calendar), pd-bell shows red badge with count 7 and opens the Notification Center modal listing alerts + recent broadcasts, pd-alerts-close works. Tasks: New Task modal fills and saves (title/due/save testIDs work), created task appears and marks Done via pd-task-done-{id}. Documents: pd-doc-add opens modal, pd-doc-title-input/pd-doc-expiry-input/pd-doc-save work — bucket counters (Expired/≤7/≤30/≤90/Safe) rendered correctly and newly added doc appeared. Client Health: 2 firm cards visible with grades D=45 and C=55 (expected low scores per problem note). Calendar tab: pd-cal-prev/pd-cal-next present and statutory + task + document events rendered (Factory License Bhilwara expires + TEST task shown on the correct dates). Overview regression OK — KPI cards, attendance/payroll bar charts, compliance status, statutory calendar and quick actions all render. Company_admin role scoping verified: tasks/docs are locked to Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c, and any explicit company_id in POST is overridden. Test data was cleaned up after run.

issues: Console warnings on web: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"', 'Invalid style property of "outline"', 'Invalid style property of "background"', 'Invalid style property of "padding". Value is "0 8px" but only single values are supported'. Cosmetic/warning-only on the web preview — likely coming from shared theme or a nested Ionicons/RN-web shim. Not blocking. Suggest audit of StyleSheet.create usages to replace shadow* with boxShadow and split shorthand padding/background for RN-web parity.

action_items: (Optional / non-blocking) Clean up RN-web CSS console warnings: replace shadow*/outline/background/padding shorthand in the components involved with boxShadow and long-form values.

Confirm Kankani company_admin PIN in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (line 49 says PIN was rotated by user). Admin-pin-login for admin@kankani.local + PIN 1234 returned non-200 during testing — role-scoping tests fell back to injecting a session doc. Not a Phase 2 defect, just credential drift.
Client Health scores are low (D=45, C=55) — expected per handoff note (stale attendance). No action required unless production seed changes.
critical_code_review_comments: portal_phase2.py uses `require_role(admin, ['super_admin', 'company_admin', 'sub_admin'])` inside _admin() — sub_admin is granted the same Phase-2 access as company_admin. If sub_admins should be further gated by sub_admin_permissions (as other endpoints are), consider adding a permission check for portal-tasks/documents/calendar/alerts. Not a bug per handoff but worth confirming with product intent.

list_tracked_documents applies scope but bucket counts iterate over the SAME scoped docs — correct. However date subtraction uses datetime.strptime, which will raise if any historical doc has expiry_date not in YYYY-MM-DD. All create/patch paths validate the format so this is safe; add a try/except in the reader for defense-in-depth against manually inserted docs.

toggle_calendar_item scope uses cid or '__all__'; when a super_admin toggles in 'all firms' view the completion is scoped to '__all__' — a company_admin viewing the same month sees an independent toggle (scoped to their company_id). Confirmed intentional per code, but worth documenting.
portal-dashboard.tsx BarChart labels use e.date.slice(8) for calendar dates in Overview, which drops the month. Minor UX nit — Phase 2 CalendarPanel is unaffected.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Phase 2 testIDs + Overview regression + Alerts modal verified)

seed_data_creation: Created + deleted 1 backend task (TEST_iter178) and 1 doc (TEST_iter178 factory license) inside pytest. Created + deleted 1 UI task (TEST_UI_iter178 task) and 1 UI doc (TEST_UI_iter178 doc) via web. Toggled calendar_completions month 2026-05 item tds twice (returns to original state). All TEST_* rows and 3 injected TEST_ sessions cleaned up post-run. Existing seed (Kankani task 'File PF ECR for June' + doc 'Factory License Bhilwara') preserved. Statutory 2026-06/pf toggle from prior smoke test left as-is.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend + web preview UI fully green for Phase 2. Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iter178_portal_phase2.py; run with `pytest backend/tests/test_iter178_portal_phase2.py -v`. Kankani admin-pin-login is currently broken (PIN unknown) — fixture falls back to injecting a session token directly into user_sessions collection for user_0a38839e3568. Super admin creds still work: admin-password-login email=sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com password=sharma123 (session_token key). Alert count observed: 7 alerts for cmp_527fecdd7c view.
rca_of_issue: No functional issues found. Only minor RN-web CSS warnings which are cosmetic.
